name: zendesk
description: Manage support tickets, users, and help center content

tools.name: List Tickets
tools.description: List Zendesk tickets with optional filters

tools.name: Get Ticket
tools.description: Get details of a specific ticket

tools.name: Create Ticket
tools.description: Create a new ticket in Zendesk

tools.name: Search Tickets
tools.description: Search tickets using Zendesk query syntax

prompts.title: Check ticket status
prompts.prompt: Check the status of my recent Zendesk tickets and summarize any that need attention.

prompts.title: Create support ticket
prompts.prompt: Help me create a new support ticket in Zendesk with the appropriate priority and tags.

prompts.title: Search tickets
prompts.prompt: Search Zendesk tickets for specific issues or customer inquiries.
